name: RigidBody
description: Physics-driven body with mass, gravity, drag, and axis constraints

## RigidBody

Physics-driven body with mass, gravity, drag, and axis constraints

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `mass` | Mass | `number` | `1` | - |
| `drag` | Drag | `number` | `0.05` | - |
| `angularDrag` | Angular Drag | `number` | `0.05` | - |
| `gravityScale` | Gravity Scale | `number` | `1` | - |
| `useGravity` | Use Gravity | `boolean` | `true` | - |
| `isKinematic` | Is Kinematic | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `vx` | Velocity X | `number` | `0` | - |
| `vy` | Velocity Y | `number` | `0` | - |
| `vz` | Velocity Z | `number` | `0` | - |
| `avx` | Angular Velocity X | `number` | `0` | - |
| `avy` | Angular Velocity Y | `number` | `0` | - |
| `avz` | Angular Velocity Z | `number` | `0` | - |
| `freezePositionX` | Freeze Position X | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `freezePositionY` | Freeze Position Y | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `freezePositionZ` | Freeze Position Z | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `freezeRotationX` | Freeze Rotation X | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `freezeRotationY` | Freeze Rotation Y | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `freezeRotationZ` | Freeze Rotation Z | `boolean` | `false` | - |

### Instance Attributes
| Key | Label | Type | Default |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `gravity` | Gravity | `number` | `9.81` |
